'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 109''' is the one hundred ninth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[March 26]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Molten Doom!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Molten Doom!]]"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Heroes of the galaxy Part 4"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 19: And all the King's madmen couldn't put Deathlok back together again, or could they?"
*"Tales of the Watcher: I come from far Centaurus!"
